code:
import io

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 0
  mut max_val = 0
  mut min_val = 0
  mut started = false
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(v)
        if not started
          max_val = v
          min_val = v
          started = true
        else
          if v > max_val
            max_val = v
          end
          if v < min_val
            min_val = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("max=#{max_val}")
  println("min=#{min_val}")
end

import string
